Dong Tai ŤĎ£Ťáļ
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Dong Tai (ŤĎ£Ťáļ)was born in Jianwei. A local gentleman, unsuccessfully sought the hand of the widow Han Jiang. His clients had her kidnapped. Dong Tai was affiliated with Liu Zhang.
